notes: Profiling used minimal single-node workflows. Complex strategies (swarm, pipeline, meta, langgraph) failed validation because they require specific node structures (FAN_OUT/FAN_IN, PHASE_GATE, SUB_WORKFLOW, graph_name). Simple strategies (solo, dag, graph) executed successfully with real LLM calls.

errors: Validation failed: Swarm workflow requires at least 1 FAN_OUT node; Swarm workflow requires at least 1 FAN_IN node
Validation failed: Pipeline node must be PHASE_GATE, got llm_call; Pipeline missing required phases: dispatch, research, draft, debate, consensus, synthesis, review
Validation failed: Meta workflow requires at least 1 SUB_WORKFLOW node
Validation failed: LangGraph node missing 'graph_name' in config
